loomTypes.tapestry_loom: Tapestry Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.rug_loom: Rug Loom — project tracking not currently supported
loomTypes.frame_loom: Frame Loom — project tracking not currently supported

sections.appearanceDesc: Choose your color theme and customize how the activity tracker looks.
sections.diagnosticsDesc: Configure developer-facing display options like version numbers.
sections.preferencesDesc: Update your display name and default units for measurements.
sections.privacyDesc: Control what information is visible to others on the platform.
sections.termsDesc: Review the terms of service you have accepted.
sections.accountDesc: Download your data or permanently delete your account.

appearance.trackerDefaultsHelp: Default view options when opening the activity tracker. You can still override these per-project in the tracker settings panel.
appearance.hideUnusedHelp: When enabled, shafts and treadles not used by the design are hidden in the drawdown viewer. New projects inherit this setting. Default is off (all shafts/treadles shown).
appearance.styleVariantNote: Style variants will be visually differentiated in a future update.

default.label: Default
default.desc: Standard layout with full-size pick cards and drawdown preview.

compact.label: Compact
compact.desc: Denser layout for tracking-heavy sessions with less vertical space.

high_contrast.label: High contrast
high_contrast.desc: Higher visual contrast for easier reading under bright light or for accessibility.

diagnostics.showVersionNumbersHelp: Show or hide the UI, API, and worker version badge in the bottom-right corner.

privacy.optOutHelp: Per our Terms of Service, your data is used for platform improvements by default. Toggle on to opt out.
privacy.dataUseNote: Your content, settings, and tags — including WIF files, photos, and project data — may be used for AI/ML model training and feature improvements as described in the Terms of Service.
privacy.sharingNote: Opting out also disables all public sharing links for your drafts.
privacy.storeEmail: Email address and display name (from your sign-in provider)
privacy.storeFiles: WIF files, loom records, projects, photos, and yarn you create
privacy.storeSettings: Settings, tags, and metadata you assign to your content
privacy.noSell: We never sell your data. See our Terms of Service for the full policy.

optOutModal.title: Opt out of data use?
optOutModal.body: Opting out stops future use of your data for AI/ML model training and feature improvements. Data already used in model training cannot be retroactively removed.
optOutModal.warningTitle: The following will be disabled immediately:
optOutModal.sharingLinks: Public sharing links for all your drafts
optOutModal.futureSharing: Any future sharing features tied to your account
optOutModal.loseAccess: Anyone with your current sharing links will immediately lose access.
optOutModal.reOptInNote: You can opt back in at any time from this page. Re-opting in restores sharing access but does not re-enable individual draft links — you will need to re-share those manually.

terms.accepted: You have accepted the current version.
terms.notAccepted: You have not yet accepted the current version.

feedbackHistory.description: Submissions you've sent, including anonymous ones. Only you can see this list.

account.archiveEmailNotice: We'll send you an email when your archive is ready to download.
account.archiveNote: Includes your WIF files, project photos, and a JSON export of all your records.
account.dangerDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data: WIF files, photos, project records, looms, yarn, and drafts. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteConfirmInstruction: Type DELETE MY ACCOUNT to confirm:

landing.heroBody: Upload your WIF draft, follow along pick by pick, and keep a complete record of every draft from first warp to last pick.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need at the loom

trackWeaves.title: Track your weaves
trackWeaves.body: Upload your WIF draft and step through every pick. weftmark keeps your place so you can put down the shuttle and pick it right back up.

recordPicks.title: Record every pick
recordPicks.body: Advance, reverse, or jump to any row. Mark a project complete when the last pick is woven in.

manageTools.title: Manage your tools
manageTools.body: Keep a record of your looms and yarn. Assign a loom to a draft and track what's on the beam.

collectionSection.heading: Collections
collectionSection.empty: No collections yet. Group your drafts and projects into named explorations.

collections.empty: No collections yet. Group your drafts and projects into named explorations.

draftsPage.title: Drafts
draftsPage.emptyState: No drafts yet. Upload a WIF file to get started.

projectsPage.title: Projects
projectsPage.emptyState: No projects yet. Start one to begin tracking a weaving session.

drafts.heading: Drafts ({{count}})
drafts.empty: No drafts in this collection yet.

projects.heading: Projects ({{count}})
projects.empty: No projects in this collection yet.

yarnPage.title: Yarn inventory
yarnPage.emptyState: No yarn yet. Add your first entry to start tracking your stash.

projectLandingPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this project? This cannot be undone.
projectLandingPage.approxDistribution: {{epi}} EPI is not an exact multiple of {{dents}}-dent. Approximate threading distribution:
projectLandingPage.useCleanSett: For a clean sett, use a {{dent}}-dent reed.
projectLandingPage.projectSharedManage: Project is shared — click to manage
projectLandingPage.tieUpNotAvailable: Tie-up data not available — this WIF file does not contain a [TIEUP] section.
projectLandingPage.tieUpDesc: Columns = treadles · Rows = shafts · Filled = connected

projectDetailPage.patternPreviewUnavailable: Pattern preview unavailable for this design.
projectDetailPage.addPhotosPrompt: Add photos to document your work
projectDetailPage.deletePhotoConfirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.
projectDetailPage.projectSharedManage: Project is shared — click to manage
projectDetailPage.presentModeTitle: Present mode — fullscreen + keep screen on
projectDetailPage.arrowKeysHint: ← → arrow keys or spacebar to navigate picks
projectDetailPage.loomHasActive: This loom has an active project:
projectDetailPage.resolveToRestart: Resolve it to restart this one.
projectDetailPage.cloneDesc: Create a new project with the same configuration, starting at pick 1.
projectDetailPage.confirmCloneQuestion: Start a new project with the same settings?
projectDetailPage.resolveToClone: Resolve it to start the clone.
projectDetailPage.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete this project and all step history? This cannot be undone.
projectDetailPage.noWeftColors: This design has no weft colors defined.
projectDetailPage.assignLoomToStart: Assign a loom to start tracking picks.
projectDetailPage.picksDoneReadyNext: {{picks}} picks done. Ready to start item {{next}} of {{total}}.
projectDetailPage.markAsDone: Mark the project as completed when you're done.

draftDetailPage.archivedNote: This draft is archived and hidden from your active list.
draftDetailPage.previewUnavailable: Preview not available for this file.
draftDetailPage.archiveNote: Hide this draft from active lists without deleting it. Existing projects are unaffected.
draftDetailPage.unarchiveNote: Restore this draft to your active list.
draftDetailPage.deleteNote: Permanently removes this draft and its WIF file.
draftDetailPage.liftPlanCanBeComputed: This WIF has treadling and tie-up data. A lift plan can be computed algorithmically and added to the draft.
draftDetailPage.treadleMismatchDesc: [WEAVING] declares {{numDeclared}} treadles but the treadling data only uses {{numUsed}}.
draftDetailPage.shaftMismatchDesc: [WEAVING] declares {{numDeclared}} shafts but the lift plan only uses {{numUsed}}.
draftDetailPage.overrideToFix: Override to fix loom compatibility checks and correct the exported file.
draftDetailPage.warpLengthRequired: Warp calculations unavailable until warp length is set.
draftDetailPage.reedNoMatch: No standard reed matches {{epi}} EPI exactly. Nearest clean setts: {{near1}} or {{near2}} EPI.
draftDetailPage.usedByConflict_one: This draft is used by {{count}} active project:
draftDetailPage.usedByConflict_other: This draft is used by {{count}} active projects:
draftDetailPage.conflictNote: Remove this draft from those projects first, or force-delete — which will also delete all listed projects.
draftDetailPage.forceDelete_one: Force delete ({{count}} project will be deleted)
draftDetailPage.forceDelete_other: Force delete ({{count}} projects will be deleted)

yarnDetailPage.deleteYarnConfirm: Delete this yarn and all skein records? This cannot be undone.

loomDetailPage.trackingNotSupportedDesc: this loom type is not currently supported for project tracking. It has been saved for documentation and will be available if support is added later.
loomDetailPage.retireNote: Hide this loom from active lists without deleting it. Existing projects are unaffected.
loomDetailPage.unretireNote: Restore this loom to your active equipment list.
loomDetailPage.deleteNote: Permanently removes the loom and all its configurations. This cannot be undone.
loomDetailPage.usedByConflict_one: This loom is used by {{count}} active project:
loomDetailPage.usedByConflict_other: This loom is used by {{count}} active projects:
loomDetailPage.conflictUnlinkNote: The loom will be unlinked from those projects. Projects themselves will not be deleted.
loomDetailPage.photoOverLimit: Photo is {{size}} — over the 5 MB limit
loomDetailPage.duplicateReed: You already have a {{dpi}}-dent reed on this loom.
loomDetailPage.dentsRequired: Dents per inch must be a positive number
loomDetailPage.cloneNote: Creates a new configuration pre-filled with {{name}}'s spec and accessories.

warpingPlanPage.setInProjectWarpSetup: set it in project warp setup
warpingPlanPage.setDefaultOnLoom: set a default on your loom
warpingPlanPage.wasteBetweenNotSet: is not set for this {{count}}-item project —
warpingPlanPage.approxLengthCannotCalculate: Approx length cannot be calculated — missing parameters:
warpingPlanPage.lengthCalculationIncomplete: Length calculation is incomplete — some parameters are missing:
warpingPlanPage.windingNotAvailable: Winding sequence not available — no threading data found.
warpingPlanPage.windingDesc: Wind the warp left to right in this order. One loop = one back-and-forth pass on the warping board = 2 ends.
warpingPlanPage.halfLoopNote: +1 = one extra single end at the end of that group (half-loop).
warpingPlanPage.tieupNotApplicable: Tie-up not applicable for lift-plan projects.
warpingPlanPage.tieupNotAvailable: Tie-up not available — this WIF file does not contain a [TIEUP] section.
warpingPlanPage.tieupDesc: Filled squares show which shafts are connected to each treadle. Columns = treadles (left to right), rows = shafts (top to bottom).
warpingPlanPage.threadingNotAvailable: Threading sequence not available — this WIF file does not contain a [THREADING] section.
warpingPlanPage.threadingDesc: Thread each warp end through the listed shaft(s) in order.

sharedProjectPage.linkExpiredDesc: This share link is no longer active.
sharedProjectPage.notFoundDesc: This share link does not exist or has been revoked.
sharedProjectPage.errorDesc: Unable to load this shared project.

loginPage.deniedMessage: weftmark is currently closed to new sign-ups, but your interest has been noted. We'll be in touch if that changes.
loginPage.pendingMessage: Your sign-up request has been received. You'll get an email when an admin approves your account.

registerPage.signUpPrompt: Sign up with email or connect an existing account
registerPage.accountConnected: Your account was connected. Choose a display name to finish creating your weftmark account.

pendingPage.deniedMessage: weftmark is currently closed to new sign-ups, but your interest has been noted. We'll be in touch if that changes.
pendingPage.submittedMessage: Your sign-up request has been submitted. You'll receive an email once an admin approves your account.

signOutPage.redirecting: Redirecting you to the home page…

unauthorizedPage.noPermission: You don't have permission to view this page.

uninitializedPage.title: System Not Initialized
uninitializedPage.desc: No administrator account has been configured. Run the seed command on the server to initialize the system.

versionErrorPage.title: Server Version Mismatch
versionErrorPage.desc: The server is currently being updated. Please try again in a moment, or contact your administrator if this problem persists.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service

loomCatalogPage.title: Supported looms
loomCatalogPage.intro: Looms in our catalog can be selected during loom setup for automatic spec pre-fill.
